title: 🔥宏观风险偏好持续低迷
body: 市场处于宏观避险阶段。BMRI指标报75（RISK_OFF），确认当前资金风险偏好极低，风险资产吸引力不足。虽然油价波动可能扰动美联储降息预期，但指标反馈出的紧缩现状未改。缺乏宏观流动性注入，市场难现大级别反转。中性。宽松拐点究竟在哪？
body_en: The market is in a macro risk-off phase. The BMRI indicator reads 75 (RISK_OFF), confirming that risk appetite is extremely low and risk assets simply lack appeal. While oil volatility might be rattling Fed rate cut expectations, the data confirms that tightening conditions remain unchanged. Without an injection of macro liquidity, a major reversal is off the table. Neutral. Where exactly is the pivot to easing?
